texto: A black telephonereceiver was stuffed in the small space between his ear and hisshoulder; he motioned for them to sit in the stiff wooden armchairs infront of his desk. Moments later he hung up the phone, the baseringing lightly from the impact.“So you’re still in a mess, aren’t you?” he said.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de M.L. Terese que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “A black telephonereceiver was stuffed in the small space between his ear and hisshoulder; he moti…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, detective, mystery, com foco em mystery e p-hone.

Moments later he hung up the phone, the baseringing lightly from the impact.“So you’re still in a mess, aren’t you?” he said.
